note: SYNTHETIC live country-conditions feed for the prototype. Not real.

active_incidents.summary: Record monsoon rainfall has flooded Hat Yai city centre. Hat Yai International Airport partially closed; rail links to Bangkok suspended; several districts without power. Rescue operations ongoing.
active_incidents.advisory: Defer all non-essential travel to Songkhla province. Singaporeans in the area should move to higher ground and register with the Duty Office.
active_incidents.nearest_mission: Embassy of Singapore, Bangkok (with honorary consul support, Songkhla)

active_incidents.summary: Heightened tensions have led to intermittent airspace closures and large-scale flight cancellations through Doha and Dubai hubs. Knock-on delays across connecting routes.
active_incidents.advisory: Confirm flight status directly with carriers. Avoid non-essential transit through affected hubs.
active_incidents.nearest_mission: High Commission of Singapore, Abu Dhabi

missions: High Commission of Singapore, Abu Dhabi
